title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Prestige Estates

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Prestige Estates
jsonLd.description:
We at Prestige Estates are looking for an experienced Business Development Manager based out of Faridabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Prestige Estates:
Prestige Estates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Prestige Estates!
